name: foundry-great
summary: A heavy industrial foundry for casting bells, cannons, statuary. A towering blast furnace, crucibles on hoists, sand-casting floor, overhead cranes. Molten iron and roaring heat.

size_guidance.aspect_ratio: large square or wide rectangle — heavy machinery demands scale

primary_palette.note: cannon foundry — single blast furnace, large casting pit
bell foundry — furnace feeds crucible over bell-mold
general foundry — multiple forges feeding shared crucible

story_prompts: mid-pour — crucible tipped over the mold, master roaring orders
war contract — rows of cannon-molds in the sand floor, state inspector present
furnace banked — cool-down day, apprentices chipping slag
catastrophic breach — cracked crucible, molten iron spilled, dead apprentice

lighting_notes.ambient_intent: fierce orange glow from furnace (0.4) — hot zones light their own space

anti_patterns: blast furnace on exterior wall with implied chimney — never centerfloor
casting pits recessed into the floor, not placed like props — imply them
keep overhead crane paths clear — nothing directly under the crane run
